decisions.decision: Docs files use pure-JS, framework-agnostic code samples (no React, no TypeScript in body, no project-internal service imports)
decisions.rationale: User explicit correction. Saved as feedback memory feedback_docs_style.md so future sessions follow the same rule. Existing Translate-API.md / Summary-API.md follow the same pattern.

decisions.decision: Live-Translate gets a full Tabs refactor (Docs first, Demo second), matching Proofreader/Multimodal — not a separate /live-translate/docs page
decisions.rationale: User asked for 'similar of how it done in summary, chat etc.' — those use Tabs with Docs as the default. Tabs.path='' for demo + path='/docs' for docs is the established convention.

decisions.decision: SEO entries duplicated byte-identically across useSEOData.ts and prerender-react.js for /live-translate/docs
decisions.rationale: Project convention — Phase 7 hotfix precedent. Drift between these files broke crawler parity once already.
